title: Average of the average in bar
excerpt:
Description
Having the average of the average in the stacked bar. Right now it only show the sum of the average (useluss) 
What are you trying to achieve
Keep the granularity of the data without making 100x graphs

posts.author: desazza (Simone)

Description
